name: Lamb with Spinach (Dilli Ka Saag Gosht)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add peppercorns, cloves, bay leaves, and cardamom pods; stir for a moment.
3. Add finely chopped onions, garlic, and ginger; fry until onions form brown specks.
4. Incorporate cubed lamb, ground cumin, coriander seeds, cayenne pepper, and 1/2 of the salt. Stir and cook for about one minute.
5. Mix in 1 tablespoon of yogurt; stir and cook another minute.
6. Continue cooking until all yogurt is blended and meat has a light brown hue.
7. Add spinach and remaining salt; stir to combine.
8. Cook, covered tightly, on low heat for approximately 1 hour or until lamb is tender.
9. Remove lid, add garam masala, and return to medium heat.
10. Stir and cook an additional 5 minutes until most liquid evaporates and the sauce thickens into a green consistency.
11. Discard whole spices; serve.
